completed: Implemented check for active batch in backend
Updated student navigation with History and Dashboard links
Restored ARC Club branding to Student Portal layout in App.jsx
pending: Final UI polish across other roles (if needed)

decisions.context: Student dashboard was showing old data after batches were closed.
decisions.decision: Force dashboard to 'no_batch' state if latest batch is closed and provide a separate History view.
decisions.trade_offs: Students must click an extra time to see historical data, but the dashboard remains clean and focused on urgent actions.

decisions.context: ARC Club branding disappeared in Student Portal update.
decisions.decision: Restored 'Student Portal' subtitle and 'Built by ARC Club Community' footer to StudentLayout.
decisions.trade_offs: None; maintained consistency with Admin Sidebar.
